description: Style Noteadrika captures the mood of the moment with this statement piece designed to snazz up any outfit. Keep the rest of your accessories minimal for maximum impact and style this with a monochrome top. Product DetailsThick brown, green and bronze beads connected to a slim link chainChain has a lobster claspMaterial and CareWood and plastic beads with brass fittingsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength: 60 cm
